steps.t: Eywind is somewhere near Caivád Sâr as the War of Three Peaks continues.
Some dwarves remain dangerously close to the path where Eywind has set his stolen goblin-bombs! Eywind will not evacuate them, so it falls to you.
Eywind is south of the Angmarim tower of Caivád Sâr, and you should return to him quickly. You do not know how long his goblin-bombs will remain undet…
Eywind is south of Caivád Sâr, admiring his handiwork.
The goblin-sneak probably set his stolen bomb somewhere near the lakeside trench to the south-west, hoping to do as much damage to the dwarves as poss…
Eywind is in the lakeside trench during the War of Three Peaks.
Durin is inside Zarkul-sulûn while the War of Three Peaks continues.
